# DownloadTrigger

A utility component that triggers a file download when clicked. Wraps its children and initiates a download of the specified resource.

## Import

```jsx
import { DownloadTrigger } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `href` | `string` | - | The URL of the file to download. |
| `download` | `string` | - | The filename to save the downloaded file as. |
| `mimeType` | `string` | - | The MIME type of the file (e.g., `"image/png"`, `"application/pdf"`). |

## Usage

### Basic Download

```jsx
<DownloadTrigger href="/files/report.pdf" download="report.pdf">
  <Button>Download Report</Button>
</DownloadTrigger>
```

### Download with MIME Type

```jsx
<DownloadTrigger
  href="/api/export/data.csv"
  download="export-data.csv"
  mimeType="text/csv"
>
  <Button variant="outline">Export CSV</Button>
</DownloadTrigger>
```

### Image Download

```jsx
<DownloadTrigger
  href="/images/chart.png"
  download="chart.png"
  mimeType="image/png"
>
  <Button size="sm">Save Image</Button>
</DownloadTrigger>
```
